description: An NDT technician must inspect a critical composite fuselage panel for internal defects using ultrasonic equipment.

nodes.task_description: Calibrate the ultrasonic inspection equipment according to the established procedure.
Scan the entire surface of the fuselage panel with the ultrasonic probe.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the scan of the designated area.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the scan data for any anomalies that could indicate delamination or voids, and generate a report of the findings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the data, finds no defects, and generates a 'pass' report.
